app.title: English Speaking Coach
app.description: Practice English speaking with AI-powered feedback. Choose a topic, record yourself, and get word-by-word accuracy analysis.

speaking.label: Speaking
speaking.desc: Read text aloud and get pronunciation feedback

listening.label: Listening
listening.desc: Listen and type what you hear — dictation challenge

reading.label: Reading
reading.desc: Read a passage and answer comprehension questions

writing.label: Writing
writing.desc: Respond to a prompt and get grammar & CEFR feedback

A1.label: A1 — Beginner
A1.desc: Simple words and phrases, present tense, basic vocabulary

A2.label: A2 — Elementary
A2.desc: Short sentences, past tense, everyday topics

home.tagline: Four skills. Five CEFR levels. Real AI feedback.
home.generateTopicError: Couldn't generate a new topic. Try again.

streak.noStreak: Practice today to start a streak

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.summary: Your accuracy went from {{from}}% to {{to}}% over your last {{count}} sessions.
progress.notEnoughData: Complete a few more speaking or listening sessions to see your progress trend.

placement.title: Level Check
placement.subtitle: A quick 5-minute check across all four skills so we can personalize your practice.
placement.introBody: You'll answer 15 quick multiple-choice questions, write a few sentences, and read a short passage aloud. We'll estimate your CEFR level per skill and suggest what to focus on next.
placement.generating: Building a fresh set of questions for you…
placement.generateError: Couldn't generate the level check. Try again.
placement.pressPlay: Press play, then answer the question below.
placement.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition isn't supported in this browser — try Chrome, or skip this step.

recording.notAvailableBody: Your browser doesn't support the Web Speech API. Please use Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge for the best experience.
recording.speakClearlyTip: Speak clearly… press stop when finished

history.title: Session History
history.noResults: No sessions found for this filter.

recommendations.findLevelBody: Take a 5-minute check to get a personalized CEFR level and tips per skill.

feedback.title: AI Feedback
feedback.recordFirst: Record yourself speaking first before requesting feedback.
